title: T2WS1 Calculating your estimated tax payable and tax credits for 2026 - Canada.ca
content:
## T2WS1 Calculating your estimated tax payable and tax credits for 2026
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Worksheet for use by corporations to estimate the current-year tax payable and tax credits. These amounts will be used to calculate instalment payments on worksheet T2WS2 or T2WS3.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. ### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
